name: GeoSentinel
description: **GeoSentinel** is a geospatial monitoring platform that tracks global movement in real time.  It aggregates ship and flight routes, live coordinates, and geodata into a unified system, providing clear geographic and geopolitical awareness for analysis, visualization, and decision-making.
readme_summary: GeoSentinel is a real-time geospatial monitoring platform that aggregates ship, flight, and geodata to provide global movement awareness. It offers tools for analysis, visualization, and decision-making, including advanced features like dark web searching and AI-powered assistance.
key_features: AI assistant for automated tracking and OSINT
primary_use_case: Real-time global movement monitoring and geopolitical awareness for analysis and decision-making.
cover_image_prompt: A high-tech globe at the center of a bustling command center, with glowing lines representing real-time ship and flight paths crisscrossing its surface. Data streams, visualized as digital particles, flow from various sources (ships, planes, news feeds) into the globe. A central console displays geopolitical insights and sentiment analysis. Subtle UI elements and code snippets are visible on surrounding screens. The overall mood is one of comprehensive global awareness and control. Style: 3D isometric illustration with a futuristic, clean aesthetic and a vibrant blue and green color palette.

name: CasaOS
description: CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.
readme_summary: CasaOS is an open-source personal cloud operating system designed for ease of use and elegance. It allows users to easily manage applications and services on their own hardware, providing a self-hosted alternative to cloud services.
key_features: Focus on user autonomy and cost reduction
primary_use_case: To provide a user-friendly, self-hosted personal cloud experience for managing applications and services.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, stylized robot assistant standing in a cozy, modern living room, holding a tablet that displays a clean, organized dashboard. Around the robot, various digital 'building blocks' representing different applications (like a cloud storage icon, a media server icon, a smart home hub icon) are neatly arranged and connected to a central 'CasaOS' hub. The overall mood is one of simplicity, control, and personalized digital organization, with soft, inviting lighting. The style should be a clean, 3D isometric illustration with vibrant but not overwhelming colors, emphasizing ease of use and the concept of a personal, self-managed digital ecosystem.

name: youre-the-os
description: A game where you are a computer's OS and you have to manage processes, memory and I/O events.
readme_summary: You're the OS! is a Python-based game where players act as a computer's operating system. The core gameplay involves managing processes, memory, and I/O events to keep the user happy and prevent system reboots. It can be played as a desktop application or a web version.
primary_use_case: A simulation game where players experience and manage the core functions of an operating system.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical, anthropomorphic computer brain acting as a diligent conductor, orchestrating a symphony of digital elements. The brain, labeled 'You're the OS!', wears a conductor's hat and holds a glowing baton. Around it, various icons representing processes (like gears and spinning disks), memory blocks (glowing cubes), and I/O events (flashing lightning bolts) move in harmony. Some elements are slightly chaotic, showing user impatience (a grumpy face icon), while others are perfectly aligned, indicating smooth operation. The background is a stylized, clean digital interface with subtle code snippets and data flow lines. The overall mood is playful yet organized, with a vibrant, friendly color palette. Style: 3D isometric illustration with clear, friendly character design and glowing digital effects.

name: sia
description: SIA is a Self Improving AI framework to autonomously improve the performance of any AI system (Model / Agent) on a benchmark task.
readme_summary: SIA is a Self-Improving AI framework designed to autonomously enhance the performance of any AI system on benchmark tasks. It achieves this through an iterative loop involving a meta-agent, a target agent, and a feedback agent, which collectively refine the target agent's capabilities.
key_features: Autonomous performance improvement for AI systems
Iterative refinement loop with meta, target, and feedback agents
Updates both harness and weights of task-specific agents
Supports multiple LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini)
Includes built-in tasks for easy local testing (gpqa, lawbench, etc.)
primary_use_case: To autonomously improve the performance of AI models or agents on specific benchmark tasks through a self-correcting and self-refining loop.
cover_image_prompt: A master craftsman, representing the SIA framework, meticulously sculpting a raw block of digital clay (representing an AI model) into a highly polished, intricate statue. The craftsman uses glowing tools that emit streams of data and code snippets, subtly refining the statue's form. Around the workshop, smaller screens display performance metrics and successful benchmark results. The overall scene is a bright, modern workshop with a focus on the transformation process, rendered in a clean, 3D isometric illustration style with a vibrant, data-inspired color palette.

name: SkillSpector
description: Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.
readme_summary: SkillSpector is a Python-based security scanner designed to detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks in AI agent skills before they are installed. It provides a comprehensive analysis to ensure the safety and integrity of AI agent ecosystems.
key_features: Multi-format input (Git repos, URLs, zip files, directories, single files)
Detection of 68 vulnerability patterns across 17 categories
Two-stage analysis: static analysis and optional LLM semantic evaluation
Live vulnerability lookups with OSV.dev integration and offline fallback
Multiple output formats (Terminal, JSON, Markdown, SARIF)
Risk scoring with severity labels and recommendations
primary_use_case: Scanning AI agent skills for security vulnerabilities and malicious intent before installation.
cover_image_prompt: A vigilant digital guardian, represented as a stylized knight with a glowing visor, stands before a gate leading into a vibrant, futuristic city representing an AI ecosystem. The guardian holds a magnifying glass that reveals hidden, glowing red 'threat' symbols within packages approaching the gate. Successfully scanned packages emit a soft green aura. Small, translucent screens around the guardian display abstract code patterns and risk scores. The overall mood is one of protection and proactive security, with a clean, modern aesthetic and a color palette of blues, greens, and subtle reds for threats. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with clear, defined shapes and a focus on the guardian's protective role.
